things.name: Millennium Park & Cloud Gate
things.description: The iconic Bean sculpture, Crown Fountain and free summer concerts in Chicago's stunning lakefront park

things.name: Art Institute of Chicago
things.description: One of the world's great art museums — Seurat's Sunday on La Grande Jatte and American Gothic are here

things.name: Chicago Architecture Boat Tour
things.description: The best way to see Chicago's extraordinary skyline — 90-minute guided river cruise past iconic buildings

things.name: 360 Chicago (John Hancock Observatory)
things.description: The TILT experience tilts you out over Michigan Avenue 94 floors up — breathtaking lake and city views

things.name: Deep Dish Pizza
things.description: Chicago's greatest culinary icon — try Lou Malnati's, Giordano's or Pizzeria Uno where it was invented in 1943

things.name: The Magnificent Mile
things.description: Chicago's premier shopping boulevard along North Michigan Avenue — flagship stores and architectural landmarks

things.name: Wrigley Field Tour
things.description: Baseball's most beloved ballpark (1914) — home of the Chicago Cubs with iconic ivy-covered outfield walls

things.name: Field Museum of Natural History
things.description: World-class museum on Museum Campus with Sue, the most complete T-Rex skeleton ever found

things.name: Chicago Riverwalk
things.description: Two miles of restaurants, bars and kayak rentals along the Chicago River through the heart of downtown

things.name: Navy Pier
things.description: Chicago's most visited attraction — ferris wheel, IMAX, Shakespeare Theatre and spectacular fireworks
